subject: Heatran, a large quadrupedal metallic Pokemon with a cross-shaped face and molten lava-like body, standing in a volcanic environment
description: A massive, hulking quadrupedal creature with a broad metallic body and distinctive cross-shaped facial markings stands amid a volcanic, magma-lit environment. The body has a dark iron-like quality with glowing orange-red accents suggesting internal heat or molten material. Rocks and magma flow around it. The composition is dramatic, with the creature positioned at center commanding the scene. The palette is dark metallic brown-black against vivid red, orange, and magma-glow.
foreground: large metallic quadruped with cross-face markings amid lava rocks
